---
layout: default
title: "Parliamentary Oaths and Policy Shifts in India"
date: 2026-06-29T12:44:50.623984+00:00
summary: "Mallikarjun Kharge and other MPs take oath in the Rajya Sabha, while the Delhi government approves a new EV policy and CBSE adjusts its language curriculum"
run_time_ist: "6:14PM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 6:14PM</p>


## India National Politics

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Rajya Sabha Oaths:</strong> Mallikarjun Kharge has been reappointed as the Leader of Opposition in the Rajya Sabha following his oath-taking alongside other newly elected members, including BJP&#x27;s Tarun Chugh.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I4</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I10</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I11</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I12</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Legislative Setback:</strong> The Constitutional Amendment Bill aimed at implementing women’s reservation in the Lok Sabha and State Assemblies has failed to pass in the Lok Sabha.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqwFBVV95cUxPSTVKRHVGUXlhNjVqNEczYkNpd1NvbmRYOU5Fd2RIZjV3OHBob0owSzh3LVRXdUVqSDNVZTgtbVZlUG8ybS1wallfSVdTeTRtNENIU0lwV3piczdxV2NEVmE0WC1GSTQyMjR4dkNPb1pqblB2SzNHQjZBRWVXZHpPZXE2bVlQc3NGNEFJVU1NUHJMMFFqSkdRUVFFMGZNRUkzSTc0LXphM1JaLXM?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I22</a></span></li>
</ul>

## Policy and Institutions

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Education Policy:</strong> The CBSE has granted a one-time exemption to current Class 9 and 10 students from the three-language policy, while mandating two Indian languages for future board requirements.</li>
  <li><strong>Delhi EV Policy:</strong> The Delhi Cabinet has approved a new electric vehicle policy that mandates a transition to electric autos by 2027 and electric two-wheelers by 2028.</li>
</ul>
